channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BIZOTIC] Sangita Annmol Aggarwala Acquires 14.27% Stake in Bizotic Commercial Ltd Through Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Sangita Annmol Aggarwala, along with Bizotic Dynamics Private Limited, Bizotic India Private Limited, Bizotic Industries Private Limited, and Bizotic Nexus Private Limited, have acquired 13,38,000 equity shares of Bizotic Commercial Ltd. The acquisition was made on 30th March 2026 through a preferential issue. The total equity shares of the company before the acquisition were 80,40,000, which increased to 93,78,000 after the acquisition. The total voting rights of the company also increased from 69.97% to 74.26% due to the acquisition.

  • Sangita Annmol Aggarwala and four other entities acquire 13,38,000 equity shares of Bizotic Commercial Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through a preferential issue on 30th March 2026.
  • The total equity shares of the company increased from 80,40,000 to 93,78,000 due to the acquisition.
  • The total voting rights of the company increased from 69.97% to 74.26% due to the acquisition.
  • Sangita Annmol Aggarwala and the four entities belong to the Promoter/Promoter Group of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bizotic Commercial Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GALLANTT] Gallantt Ispat Ltd: Prem Prakash Agrawal Transfers Shares to Gallantt Trust
item.description:
Prem Prakash Agrawal has transferred 12,910,134 equity shares of Gallantt Ispat Limited to Gallantt Trust through an off-market transaction. This transfer is in accordance with the SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026, which grants exemption from complying with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The transaction involves Prem Prakash Agrawal and 33 other persons acting in concert (PACs). The total equity shares of Gallantt Ispat Limited before the transaction were 24,12,80,945 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each, and after the transaction, the total diluted share/voting capital of the TC remains the same.

  • Prem Prakash Agrawal transfers 12,910,134 equity shares to Gallantt Trust
  • Transaction in accordance with SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026
  • 33 other persons acting in concert (PACs) involved in the transaction
  • Total equity shares of Gallantt Ispat Limited before the transaction were 24,12,80,945 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each
  • Total diluted share/voting capital of the TC remains the same after the transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gallantt Ispat Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GALLANTT] Gallantt Trust Acquires Majority Shares of Gallantt Ispat Ltd from Chandra Prakash Agrawal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gallantt Trust, a part of the Promoter Group of Gallantt Ispat Limited, has acquired 60.051% of the total paid-up share capital of the company from Chandra Prakash Agrawal through an OFF-MARKET transaction. This acquisition includes 14,48,90,556 equity shares, which is 60.051% of the total equity shares of the company. The transaction was made without a public announcement of an open offer, as per the SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026, granting exemption from complying with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

  • Gallantt Trust, a part of the Promoter Group, acquires 60.051% shares of Gallantt Ispat Ltd from Chandra Prakash Agrawal.
  • The acquisition includes 14,48,90,556 equity shares, which is 60.051% of the total equity shares of the company.
  • The transaction was made through an OFF-MARKET transaction.
  • The acquisition was made without a public announcement of an open offer, as per the SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026.
  • The SEBI Exemption Order was granted to the Trust for exemption from complying with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gallantt Ispat Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INNOVACAP] Vistra ITCL Acquires 3.28% Stake in Innova Captab Ltd via Debenture Trustee/Security Trustee Role
item.description:
Vistra ITCL (India) Limited, a debenture trustee and security trustee, has acquired 3.28% stake in Innova Captab Ltd. The acquisition includes 18,75,000 shares carrying voting rights. The mode of acquisition is non-disposal undertaking and the date of acquisition is 24.03.2026. The equity share capital of Innova Captab Ltd before the acquisition was Rs. 1,87,50,000/- and after the acquisition, it remains the same. The total diluted share/voting capital of the TC after the acquisition is also the same.

  • Vistra ITCL (India) Limited acquires 3.28% stake in Innova Captab Ltd
  • The acquisition includes 18,75,000 shares carrying voting rights
  • The mode of acquisition is non-disposal undertaking
  • The date of acquisition is 24.03.2026
  • The equity share capital and total diluted share/voting capital of Innova Captab Ltd remains the same post-acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innova Captab Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BONLON] Bonlon Industries Ltd: Bon-Lon Securities Acquires 8.38% Stake Through Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Bonlon Industries Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Bon-Lon Securities Ltd, a promoter/promoter group, has acquired 8.38% stake in the company through the conversion of warrants. The total voting rights of the company after the acquisition stand at 71.21%.

  • Bon-Lon Securities Ltd, a promoter/promoter group, has acquired 8.38% stake in Bonlon Industries Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through the conversion of warrants
  • The total voting rights of the company after the acquisition stand at 71.21%
  • Before the acquisition, Bon-Lon Securities Ltd held 6.71% voting rights
  • The warrants held by the acquirer did not entitle them to any voting rights or other shareholder rights until conversion

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bonlon Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TRITONV] Triton Valves Ltd Allots 38,41,581 Bonus Equity Shares in 3:1 Ratio
item.description:
Triton Valves Ltd has allotted 38,41,581 equity shares as fully paid-up bonus equity shares, in the ratio 3:1, to eligible members whose names appeared in the Register of Members/ Beneficial Owners as on the Record Date i.e., 01st April 2026. This allotment has increased the company's paid-up share capital to INR 5,12,21,080/- (Indian Rupees Five Crores Twelve Lakhs Twenty One Thousand Eighty Only) divided into 51,22,108 (Fifty One Lakhs Twenty Two Thousand One Hundred Eight) equity shares of face value of INR 10/- (Indian Rupees Ten Only) each.

  • Triton Valves Ltd allotted 38,41,581 bonus equity shares in a 3:1 ratio.
  • The allotment increased the company's paid-up share capital to INR 5,12,21,080/-.
  • The allotment was made to eligible members as of the Record Date, 01st April 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRITON VALVES LTD. | Category: Bonus

item.title: [SDL] Neev Nirav Jogani Acquires 24.80% Stake in Span Divergent Ltd. Through Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Neev Nirav Jogani has acquired a 24.80% stake in Span Divergent Ltd. through a preferential allotment on 28th March, 2026. This acquisition was made in accordance with Regulation 29(1) and Regulation 29(3) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The shares were acquired at a price of 0 per share. This acquisition increases Jogani's holding from 0 to 24.80% in the company.

  • Neev Nirav Jogani acquires 24.80% stake in Span Divergent Ltd.
  • Acquisition made through preferential allotment on 28th March, 2026.
  • Acquisition in accordance with SEBI Regulations 29(1) and 29(3).
  • Share price for the acquisition was 0 per share.
  • Jogani's holding in the company increased from 0 to 24.80%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Span Divergent Ltd-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GALLANTT] Santosh Kumar Agrawal Transfers Shares of Gallantt Ispat Ltd. to Gallantt Trust through Off-Market Transaction
item.description:
Santosh Kumar Agrawal, a Promoter Group Shareholder of Gallantt Ispat Limited, has transferred 16902501 equity shares to Gallantt Trust through an OFF-MARKET transaction. This transfer is in accordance with the SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026, granting exemption from complying with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The transaction details and disclosures are attached for reference.

  • Santosh Kumar Agrawal transfers 16902501 equity shares to Gallantt Trust
  • Transaction done through OFF-MARKET transaction
  • In accordance with SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026
  • Exemption from complying with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
  • Gallantt Trust is a Promoter Group Shareholder

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gallantt Ispat Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GALLANTT] Chandra Prakash Agrawal Transfers Shares Worth INR 89.49 Crores to Gallantt Trust
item.description:
Chandra Prakash Agrawal, along with PACs, has transferred 8,94,96,719 equity shares of Gallantt Ispat Limited to Gallantt Trust through an off-market transaction. The transaction is in accordance with the SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026, granting exemption from complying with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The total equity share capital of Gallantt Ispat Limited remains unchanged at 24,12,80,945 Equity Shares of INR 10 each, both before and after the transaction.

  • Transfer of 8,94,96,719 equity shares by Chandra Prakash Agrawal and PACs to Gallantt Trust
  • Transaction valued at INR 89.49 crores
  • Off-market transaction in accordance with SEBI Order dated March 20, 2026
  • Gallantt Ispat Limited's equity share capital remains unchanged at 24,12,80,945 Equity Shares of INR 10 each
  • SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, and SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015 disclosures submitted

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gallantt Ispat Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [ONESOURCE] Catalyst Trusteeship Acquires Additional Shares of Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd via Pledge from Tenshi Pharmaceuticals
item.description:
Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd, acting in its capacity as the Debenture Trustee for the Debenture Holders, has acquired additional shares of Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd via pledge from Tenshi Pharmaceuticals Private Limited. The acquisition is in accordance with the terms of an amended and restated debenture trust deed and share pledge agreement dated March 09, 2026. The pledge is for the benefit of the holders of Debentures (including their assigns, transferees, successors and novates from time to time). The total number of shares pledged is 28,36,811, which constitutes 2.47% of the issued and paid-up share capital of Onesource Specialty Pharma Limited.

  • Catalyst Trusteeship acquires additional shares of Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd via pledge from Tenshi Pharmaceuticals.
  • The acquisition is in accordance with the terms of an amended and restated debenture trust deed and share pledge agreement dated March 09, 2026.
  • The total number of shares pledged is 28,36,811, which constitutes 2.47% of the issued and paid-up share capital of Onesource Specialty Pharma Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
